query: SELECT u.name, u.email, ca.title, ca.bio, ca.specialties, ca.languages, ca.location, ca.experience_years, ca.status FROM consultant_applications ca JOIN users u ON ca.user_id = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Sumin%' OR u.name LIKE '%sumin%' OR u.email LIKE '%sumin%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2JnPRnaAUkD2vcq.root --database 7CDWVFFxWiw496tEAbvLTL --execute SELECT u.name, u.email, ca.title, ca.bio, ca.specialties, ca.languages, ca.location, ca.experience_years, ca.status FROM consultant_applications ca JOIN users u ON ca.user_id = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Sumin%' OR u.name LIKE '%sumin%' OR u.email LIKE '%sumin%' LIMIT 5;
